title: About i-power
short_description: Company overview of i-power (power division of Interconnect Solutions).
product_info: i-power is the power division of Interconnect Solutions, dealing in AC & DC power back-up solutions. State-of-the-art manufacturing and strong R&D guarantee highest-quality products for critical power applications. i-power offers reliable UPS products with high power factors covering 1KVA to 600KVA, plus an extensive range of high-quality batteries (AGM, GEL, Pure Gel) under the ENERGEN brand from 12V/5Ah to 12V/200Ah. All standard items are available for delivery, supported by an experienced team and reliable worldwide export services by sea or air.

title: Our Solutions
short_description: i-power solutions approach and the industry sectors served.
product_info: i-power helps transform, organize and grow your network/business, acting as a partner with deep product and service knowledge. Motto: 'Technology You Can Rely On'. Full lifecycle support: supply, implementation, integration, training, consulting and customer support. Solutions are reliable and cost-effective. Sectors served: 1) Banks/Financial Institutions 2) Education 3) Commercial & Residential 4) Datacenters 5) Industrial Solutions 6) Telecom Sectors 7) Hospitals/Health Facilities.

title: T-4001 TL 1-1 (0.8,0.9PF), with built-in battery (1-10KVA)
short_description: The i-power T-4001 series is a true online double-conversion UPS that can provide your critcal equipment with reliable and stable sine wave power. It features significant advantages, including an output power factor up to 0.8/0.9 and up to 90% AC-AC efficiency for greater energy savings.
product_info: It is a versatile, high quality, and cost-competitive UPS developed to handle a wide voltage range and inconsistent power conditions. The T-4001 series provides a safe power supply guaranteed for mission-critical applications such as computer equipment, telecommunication devices, precision instrument, network termination equipment, and more.
technical_details: Product Highlights: Wide Input Voltage Range allows the UPS to work in harsh environments and reduces battery discharging time. GBT technology to achieve high overall efficiency up to 90%. High input power factor (0.99) and low harmonic distortion (THDI 5%) saves upstream investment. Can be connected with all kinds of generators to save customers costs. True online double-conversion topology and zero transfer time to battery provides 24/7 full-time protection. title: T-4001 6-10k TL 1-1 (0.9PF) Built-in & Long Back-up with Parallel Feature (6-10KVA)
short_description: The ipower T-4001 series is a robust online double-conversion UPS system engineered for critical power continuity in sensitive environments. With its true double-conversion architecture, it ensures uninterrupted pure sine-wave output, shielding connected equipment from voltage fluctuations, outages, and electrical disturbances. Operating at 94% efficiency in online mode and up to 98% in ECO mode, the system enhances energy savings without compromising reliability.
product_info: The ipower T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (120–285VAC) and outstanding voltage accuracy (±1%). It supports a 0.9 output power factor and delivers clean output with less than 2% THD on linear loads. Certified for safety and performance, the system complies with CE, IEC/EN62040 standards, ensuring reliable operation across diverse industries.
technical_details: True Double-Conversion Technology Ensures seamless power protection and high adaptability to harsh mains conditions. - Output Power Factor Delivers a 0.9 output power factor for improved load capacity. - High Efficiency Operation Achieves up to 94% efficiency in online mode and 98% in ECO mode, supporting energy savings. - Wide Input Range Supports input voltage range from 185–275VAC at 100% load and 120–185VAC with linear derating to 50% load. - LCD Display Offers real-time operational data and alerts via an easy-to-read LCD interface. - Intelligent Communication Slot (Optional) Supports SNMP and remote monitoring integration. - Parallel Operation (Optional) Up to 3 units can operate in parallel with optional parallel card. Model OH1006T91507S OH1006T91600S OH1010T91607S OH1010T91600S Capacity 6kVA/5.4kW 6kVA/5.4kW 10kVA/9kW 10kVA/9kW
applications: Network, Banking, Servers, PC, Security, Education, E-commerce, Labs, Emergency Devices, Control circuits

title: T-4001 6k TL 1-1 (1PF) Built-in Long Back-up with Parallel Feature (6KVA)
short_description: The ipower T-4001 series is a high-performance online doubleconversion UPS designed to deliver pure sine-wave power for mission-critical applications. With its true online technology, it provides seamless power protection against grid fluctuations, outages, and electrical noise. The system boasts an impressive output power factor of 1.0 and up to 99.5% efficiency in ECO mode, ensuring optimal energy savings while maintaining reliable operation.
product_info: T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (110- 280VAC) and exceptional voltage regulation (±1%). Its full-bridge inverter design accommodates challenging loads, including half-wave and unbalanced configurations, while maintaining less than 3% THD for clean power output.
technical_details: True Double-Conversion Technology Provides complete isolation from grid irregularities, ensuring clean and stable power output. - Pure Sine-Wave Output Protects sensitive electronics with distortion-free AC power (<3% THD for linear loads). - 60A High-Speed Charger Rapidly recharges external 48V battery banks (batteries sold separately). - Cold Start Function Powers critical loads directly from batteries without AC input. - Parallel Expansion Supports up to 9 units for single/three-phase setups with a shared battery system. - Generator-Compatible Works seamlessly with generator power sources. - Full-Bridge Inverter Design Handles half-wave & unbalanced loads without performance loss. - Zero Transfer Time Instant switch to battery power with no interruption. - LCD Display Real-time monitoring of load, battery status, and fault alerts. - Robust Protection Overload, short-circuit, and overcharge safeguards. Model Capacity OH1005T10400S 5kVA/5kW
applications: Network, Banking, Servers, PC, Security, Education, E-commerce, Labs, Emergency Devices, Control circuits

technical_details: FEATURES - Non-Contact based technology Non-contact based technology and free from abrasion & routine maintenance - Display Multi info LCD Display - Output Accuracy Precise output voltage regulation - Fast Response Fast response time against input voltage fluctuations - Protections Overload, Under/Over Voltage, Short Circuit, Bypass protection - Smart CUP control Technolgy Adapts smart CPU control technology to control all processes to increase system reliability. - Tested and Verified All devices are fully tested and verified for maximum performance. short_description: The i-power “Static Voltage Stabilizers” provide protection against main power sags, surges and brownouts. It is ideal for locations that are subject to inconsistencies in the main supply. Each stabilizer has a wide input voltage tolerance and has been designed to provide the ultimate reliability in hostile environments where the quality of the main supply cannot be guaranteed.
